category_sources: Official homepage at source_facts.homepage documents ncompress as the historical compress implementation.
source_facts.description says it is a fast, simple LZW file compressor.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README provides usage/project documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the official project site and best documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/vapier/ncompress, so repo is intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists command-line tools including compress.
